case_title: BYONG, KIM S. vs. QUINTERO, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BYONG, KIM S. AS TO DEFENDANT QUINTERO, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-07-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-09-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-18-1996
NOTICE OF APPEAL/REQUEST FOR TRANSCRIPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BYONG, KIM S.
RECORD ON APPEAL PREPARED

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-07-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-07-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-06-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-06-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE W/RESULT IN DISMISSAL, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-10-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-06-1996 TO JAN-22-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

NO SHOWING DUE DILIGENCE AS TO WHY EXISTING LAW WAS NOT USED BEFORE AND WHY PROVIDING PROPOSED MOTION FOR NOTICE BY PUBLICATION WHICH WAS POSSIBLE IN THE PAST IS A NEW FACT.
